$schema_comment: Canonical list of all protocol error codes. Layer 0 codes are relay-generated. Layer 2 codes are gateway-generated.

error_codes.meaning: Frame could not be parsed as JSON or is structurally malformed
Another gateway is already registered on this channel
Maximum number of channels on this relay has been reached
Maximum clients per channel has been reached
Frame payload exceeds the relay's --max-payload limit
Channel exceeded the relay's --rate-limit messages per second
Client sent a JOIN frame without a client_id field
The requested method name is not recognized by the gateway
The request parameters are invalid or missing required fields
The gateway encountered an unexpected internal error
The request was cancelled by the client via a CANCEL frame
The gateway timed out processing the request
Client has not completed the Layer 1 handshake
Client is not authorized for the requested method
